message:
chore: add ephemeral file patterns to .gitignore

Adds patterns for local development artifacts that should never be committed:
- storage.sqlite3, storage.sqlite3-* (local scratch databases)
- a.out (compiled output)
- .plan.md (agent planning files)
- screenshots_for_diagnostics/ (diagnostic artifacts)
- rustc-ice-*.txt (compiler crash reports)
- reports/ (generated reports)
- .agent-mail.yaml (agent config)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -11,3 +11,15 @@ target/
 pkg/
 *.wasm
 node_modules/
+
+# Local scratch SQLite DBs (never tracked)
+storage.sqlite3
+storage.sqlite3-*
+
+# Common local artifacts (avoid accidental commits)
+a.out
+.plan.md
+screenshots_for_diagnostics/
+rustc-ice-*.txt
+reports/
+.agent-mail.yaml
